label: P&L Attribution
description: Breakdown of P&L by factor: funding, carry, basis, delta, and residual with drill-down per strategy.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.7.note: Added 'No P&L attribution data' when pnlComponents.length===0.

1.3.note: pnlComponents derive from aggregatedPnL computed via getAggregatedPnlForScope(organizationIds, clientIds, strategyIds).

1.6.note: Empty arrays to getAggregatedPnlForScope return full dataset.

1.7.note: No fixture constants embedded in widget; getAggregatedPnlForScope consumed in context producer.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (shows current attribution), batch ✓ (shows batch-period attribution), paper ✓ (display-only, reads from context). Widget is read-only attribution panel.

3.2.note: pnlComponents computed from aggregatedPnL which is scope+mode-filtered in context producer.

3.3.note: Human check: no order entry; display-only.

3.4.note: Human check: no explicit mode indicator in this widget — relies on scope-summary.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget renders pnlComponents from context regardless of mode — will show paper attribution correctly once paper data flows.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in bottom-widgets.tsx PnLAttributionWidget.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3/3.4 require human browser walkthrough.

4.1.note: 'View All' Button wrapped in Link to /services/trading/pnl — navigates correctly.

4.3.note: Human check: no form fields; display-only attribution panel.

4.4.note: Human check: attribution bars update when scope changes.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.8.note: Human check: overflow-auto on root div.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: DeFi basis-trade (funding, basis_spread, trading_pnl components), staked-basis (staking_yield, lending_yield, borrow_cost, funding, rewards), and all strategies producing PnLComponent breakdown data.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 7 tests covering component rows, NET total, loading, empty-state, view-all link, null-context fallback. See tests/widgets/overview/pnl-attribution.test.tsx

7.1.note: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgb[a]?\(|hsl[a]?\(' → zero matches in PnLAttributionWidget section.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: PnLAttributionWidget is ~35 lines within bottom-widgets.tsx (188 total). Well under limits.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function found.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in PnLAttributionWidget. All data from context refs.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: No text-[...] arbitrary typography in PnLAttributionWidget section.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Spinner, Link from shared primitives. PnLAttributionPanel is a shared trading component.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt, no interactive div without role. 'View All' is a proper Button in Link. Human: keyboard walkthrough pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: P&L attribution is a distinct analytical view; its 3×3 grid slot is its correct footprint.

relationships.notes: Attribution derived from aggregated scope P&L. Links to /services/trading/pnl full page.

dataContract.notes: pnlComponents computed from aggregatedPnL in context producer. No direct API call in widget.

gaps: Sports and predictions P&L attribution factors not defined in strategy registry
Attribution panel drill-down per strategy not wired
coverage.notes: PnL attribution factors well-defined for DeFi strategies (basis, funding, staking, rewards). Other asset classes TBD.

findings.fix: Added coreLoading Spinner guard before PnLAttributionPanel render
Added 'No P&L attribution data' guard on pnlComponents.length===0

findings.description: PnLAttributionWidget — ~3 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
